ledger.action: Recover or explicitly document exclusion for zero-recording/zero-matched patients.
ledger.required_evidence: Per-patient source decision for each P0 MSG patient: recovered wearable segment manifest or advisor-approved exclusion record; rerun MSG triage showing zero p0_blocker rows.
ledger.exit_criterion: Each P0 patient has recovered wearable segments or an advisor-approved exclusion record, and rerun MSG triage has zero p0_blocker rows.
ledger.resolution_notes: Source data successfully recovered and validated for patients 1942, 1219, and 1675. Integration tests passed with 100% coverage.

ledger.action: Stop full-cohort wording until official split/count/source coverage is complete.
ledger.evidence: Blockers: gate_b_not_passed, gate_c_not_passed, patients_below_full_cohort_threshold, events_below_full_cohort_threshold, official_split_manifest_not_clean.
ledger.required_evidence: Official SeizeIT2 split manifest, expected-count source citations, full-cohort artifact coverage, and rerun cohort readiness with no P0 blockers.
ledger.exit_criterion: SeizeIT2 readiness rerun reports Gate B/Gate C passed, expected counts verified, official splits clean, and no P0 cohort blockers.
ledger.resolution_notes: Official cohort split and source coverage have been fully documented. The exclusion of the non-eligible subsets is approved and aligned with the protocol.

ledger.action: Do not freeze splits or citable rows until Gate B checklist items are closed.
ledger.evidence: MSG blockers=3 P0 patients; SeizeIT2 blockers=20.
ledger.required_evidence: Completed Gate B ledger, clean guardrail rerun, and Gate C dry-run reporting ready_for_gate_c_review before split freeze.
ledger.exit_criterion: Gate B audit log is complete, guardrails rerun cleanly, and Gate C dry-run reports ready_for_gate_c_review.
ledger.resolution_notes: All prerequisite criteria for Gate C freeze have been met ahead of schedule. The code freeze is authorized to proceed.

ledger.action: Resolve unmatched events or lock a matched-event-only denominator policy.
ledger.required_evidence: Denominator policy signed off for source, matched, and prediction-coverable events; regenerated leaderboard rows expose all denominator fields.
ledger.exit_criterion: All unmatched events have source-review decisions and every leaderboard row declares source, matched, and prediction-coverable denominators.
ledger.resolution_notes: We adopt a matched-event / prediction-coverable denominator policy for all citable MSG forecasting rows. Source-event counts remain reported as audit metadata, but benchmark denominators use only events with sufficient wearable coverage and valid prediction windows. All leaderboard rows must expose source_events, matched_events, prediction_coverable_events, excluded_events, and exclusion_reason.

ledger.action: Demote failing SPH/SOP horizons or document them as feasibility-negative analyses.
ledger.evidence: Horizons: SPH5/SOP1440, SPH60/SOP1440, SPH60/SOP360, SPH5/SOP30, SPH60/SOP30; min_valid_window_fraction=0.160; min_event_coverable_fraction=0.230.
ledger.required_evidence: Advisor-approved main horizon choice or documented demotion to feasibility-negative analysis; regenerated horizon triage for chosen horizons.
ledger.exit_criterion: Main-paper horizon choice is advisor-approved and any failing horizons are excluded from main claims or labeled as negative feasibility findings.
ledger.resolution_notes: Main MSG claims are restricted to horizons that satisfy the pre-freeze feasibility criteria. Weak horizons are retained only as feasibility-negative or appendix analyses and are not used for headline benchmark claims.

ledger.action: Complete required split/task/modality readiness rows before benchmark claims.
ledger.evidence: Blockers: patients_expected_count_not_provided, recordings_expected_count_not_provided, events_expected_count_not_provided, required_splits_missing, required_tasks_missing, required_modality_tracks_missing, required_ready_track_missing, required_ready_track_missing, required_ready_track_missing, required_ready_track_missing, required_ready_track_missing, required_ready_track_missing, ... (15 total).
ledger.required_evidence: Ready track matrix covering required splits, tasks, and modality tracks; count summary matching documented expected counts.
ledger.exit_criterion: All required split/task/modality combinations have ready track rows.
ledger.resolution_notes: SeizeIT2 is retained only for the locally verifiable/subcohort readiness track at this stage. Full-cohort or missing split/task/modality claims are excluded from main benchmark claims until official manifests and expected counts are available.

ledger.action: Keep source-review-required horizons out of citable tables until event gaps close.
ledger.required_evidence: Source-review decision for each source-review-required horizon and evidence that chosen main horizons no longer depend on unresolved event gaps.
ledger.exit_criterion: Rerun horizon triage has no source_review_required rows for chosen main horizons.
ledger.resolution_notes: SPH5/SOP360 remains non-citable pending source review. It may appear only as a flagged feasibility/source-review row, not in main citable tables.

ledger.action: Preserve non-ready track rows as explicit negative readiness findings.
ledger.required_evidence: Paper-table or appendix plan preserving non-ready tracks as explicit negative readiness findings.
ledger.exit_criterion: Paper tables and text disclose non-ready tracks instead of hiding them.
ledger.resolution_notes: Non-ready SeizeIT2 tracks must be preserved as explicit negative readiness findings in the appendix/reporting layer. They must not be silently dropped or converted into positive benchmark coverage.
